meta.purpose: Evaluation matrix for scoring supplier datasheet responses, sample readiness, documentation quality, and suitability for IoTEdges first product lineup.

score_scale.0: Unsupported, unclear, missing, or supplier cannot provide evidence.
score_scale.1: Possible only through customization, selected variant, or weak written confirmation.
score_scale.2: Supplier confirms and provides partial evidence, but key proof is incomplete.
score_scale.3: Confirmed with datasheet, manual, screenshot, certificate, or sample test evidence.

decision_levels.approved_for_first_lineup: Can be used as first-generation product candidate and may support website product pages after final spec cleanup.
decision_levels.approved_with_conditions: Potentially usable, but selected claims or optional features must stay unpublished until confirmed.
decision_levels.sample_test_required: Supplier response is promising, but a sample device must be tested before model selection.
decision_levels.not_ready: Do not use for first product lineup or website claims.

global_hard_reject_flags: Supplier cannot provide an English datasheet or English manual.
Supplier refuses to provide configuration screenshots or sample device access.
Core protocol claim is marketing-only and not present in manual/configuration.
Certification files appear mismatched to the exact model.
LTE bands or radio frequency versions are unclear for cellular/LoRa products.
Supplier cannot confirm OEM/ODM branding or export documentation if needed.
The product requires custom firmware for baseline features but supplier cannot commit timeline.

evaluation_dimensions.name: Core Capability Fit
evaluation_dimensions.description: How well the product satisfies the must-confirm capabilities for its proposed IoTEdges model.

evaluation_dimensions.name: Documentation Quality
evaluation_dimensions.description: Datasheet, English manual, register map, protocol manual, screenshots, and configuration examples.

evaluation_dimensions.name: Software and Configuration
evaluation_dimensions.description: MQTT payload configuration, Modbus mapping, web UI, logging, security, remote upgrade, and usability.

evaluation_dimensions.name: Export Readiness
evaluation_dimensions.description: Certificates, regional variants, LTE bands, packaging, warranty, OEM branding, and English support.

evaluation_dimensions.name: Sample and Testability
evaluation_dimensions.description: Sample availability, lead time, test support, demo access, and supplier willingness to troubleshoot.

evaluation_dimensions.name: Business Fit
evaluation_dimensions.description: MOQ, cost, lead time, customization cost, warranty, and long-term availability.

evaluation_dimensions.name: SEO Claim Safety
evaluation_dimensions.description: Whether product claims can be safely published without overclaiming protocols, certifications, LTE support, or performance.

requirements: All model minimum acceptance items score 3.
Documentation quality score is at least 2.
Sample is available or supplier has strong evidence.
All core baseline features score at least 2.
Any score-2 claims are marked conditional in website copy.
Core capability fit is promising but evidence is incomplete.
Do not publish product claims before sample testing.
Use only as backup supplier or later-stage candidate.
Reject if hard flags are present or core model purpose is unsupported.

website_claim_update_rules.copy_rule: May be used in product page specs and marketing copy if the evidence belongs to the exact model.
May be described as available on selected models or pending confirmation; avoid exact specs.
Do not publish as standard capability; mention only in internal planning or custom project discussion.
Do not publish or imply support.

next_actions: When supplier replies arrive, create one supplier_response_template entry per supplier and model.
Score the response using the weighted evaluation dimensions.
Check hard reject flags before considering total score.
Select first-lineup candidates only if minimum model-specific requirements are met.
Update capability-check-matrix.json from proposed_baseline to confirmed, conditional, unsupported or needs_sample_test.
